# Daniel Fridljand

> Personal website and technical blog by Daniel Fridljand.

## Preferred machine-readable endpoints

- Index: https://danielfridljand.de/index.md
- CV YAML: https://danielfridljand.de/uploads/cv.yaml
- Blog markdown pattern: https://danielfridljand.de/post/<slug>.md
- Blog HTML pattern: https://danielfridljand.de/post/<slug>
- Sitemap: https://danielfridljand.de/sitemap.xml

## Notes for agents

- The CV YAML endpoint is the canonical machine-readable resume representation.
- Prefer markdown endpoints for extraction and summarization.
- Use HTML endpoints when rendered media or interactive content context is needed.
- Content language is primarily English.

## License and usage

- Unless otherwise noted, content is copyright Daniel Fridljand.
- Quote with attribution and link to the canonical URL.
